prompt: Design a dashboard so our pacing on-call can figure out why a campaign underdelivered. We run guaranteed delivery across ~20k cohorts (market × device × placement). When a campaign misses its commitment, the on-call needs to get from 'campaign X underdelivered' to the root cause fast. Data is in ClickHouse (delivery, pacing, forecast) plus planner audit logs (allocations, reservations, replans). Real-time-ish — 15s refresh during an incident.
